entities.name: Google Calendar
entities.context: Input source for V's knowledge system

entities.context: Component that fetches calendar events and extracts V-OS tags

entities.context: Orchestrates the workflow of processing meetings

entities.name: meeting_state_manager
entities.context: Manages the state of processed meetings

entities.name: stakeholder_profile_manager
entities.context: Manages stakeholder profiles and meeting information

entities.name: meeting_monitor
entities.context: Monitors for urgent meetings every 15 minutes

entities.name: Zo
entities.context: Triggers automation cycles in the knowledge system

entities.name: Health monitor
entities.context: Checks the health of the system

relationships.context: Fetches calendar events from Google Calendar
Coordinates with the meeting API integrator
Collaborates with the meeting state manager
Interacts with the stakeholder profile manager
Connected with the meeting monitor for profile updates
